title: Point of View Checker
privacy: Runs in your browser. Your text stays on this device.
summary: Scan text for first-person, second-person, and third-person pronouns to spot mixed POV.
iconHtml:
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" role="presentation">
                      <path d="M12 5c5 0 9 7 9 7s-4 7-9 7-9-7-9-7 4-7 9-7z" class="icon-fill" opacity=".12"></path>
                      <path d="M12 5c5 0 9 7 9 7s-4 7-9 7-9-7-9-7 4-7 9-7z"></path>
                      <path d="M12 10a2 2 0 1 0 0 4 2 2 0 0 0 0-4z"></path>
                    </svg>
